series_metadata.series_description: Forms used to reimburse vendors and state agencies for goods and or services received. Includes any backup documents such as payment card log delivery and packing slips, invoices, bills of lading, bond registers, bonds & coupons redeemed, receiving reports and OAKS coding attachments.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years provided audit performed by the Auditor of State and the audit report released and all discrepancies resolved, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years provided audit performed by the Auditor of State and the audit report released and all discrepancies resolved, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
